category_sources: source_facts.description says dosfstools provides tools to create, check, and label FAT-family file systems.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is dosfstools; source_facts.repo is the official dosfstools GitHub repository.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the best available documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/dosfstools/dosfstools; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and source_facts.executables list FAT filesystem creation/checking/labeling commands.
